III 写作 第二节 读写任头
The author was cuucuse be thrifty in his childhood , but he started to waste money when coming to a city . Being skort of money , he reflected on his behavior and learn the importance of being thrifty .
As far as I'm concerned, being thrifty is about managing the money well and making good use of then't we should use then't in for right things , such as souring it in bank or using it for further education .
what's more , being thrifty is about recyding and making things useful again .
As an old saying goes . " Being thrifty makes a country , stronger . "
In my opinion , being thrifty is very important . Firstly , being thrifty can make us learn about the knawledge of economy if we can make a good budget . Secondly , it can teach us about eco-friendly and responsible living . Thirdly , it will make the world much better .
To be thrifty , we should take action and start out small . Most importantly , we should form a thrifty habit , such as making good budgets and recycle things . Secondly , we should have a thrifty life style and persuade others to be thrifty. Last but not least, the officials of the government should be a good example and build a thrifty sociaty.
I'm sure if we can be thrifty, the earth can be a better place.
